chunks.text: When Will the Robots Rebel? - EECS at Berkeley Associate Prof. Pieter Abbeel and the Robot Learning Lab are profiled in a comprehensive article for Datamation titled “ Artificial Intelligence: When Will the Robots Rebel? ” The article covers the foundational tools of AI, like machine learning, and delves into subjects like the human desire to replicate itself, the singularity, and the possibility of robot rebellion. It also looks at the ways AI currently impacts our lives and how it might change our future. Categories Faculty Research View Open Faculty Positions
